Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yulissa Zulaica for Karen Camp.

The Court asked Counsel to address the procedural issues. Ms. Zulaica stated that everything that was originally requested by the Examiner has been filed, that everybody is in agreement and on board, that the notice of hearing is filed, that it was published and that no one will object. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). The issue of bond will be addressed in the order.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Continued To Mar-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
